channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Report: Tech Company Accidentally Spends $500 Million on Anthropic's Claude AI in Single Month
item.description: An unidentified corporation reportedly spent half a billion dollars on Claude AI in just one month after failing to implement usage restrictions on employee licenses, highlighting growing concerns about runaway AI costs in corporate America. The post Report: … [Anthropic]

item.title: Oracle vs SAP Stocks 2026: Cloud AI Surge — Oracle's Infrastructure Edge or SAP's ERP Strength?
item.description: Oracle and SAP offer distinct investment opportunities for 2026, with Oracle focusing on AI-driven cloud infrastructure growth and SAP leveraging its ERP leadership amid a steady cloud transition. [Oracle, SAP]

item.title: Dell stock surges on deal with Pentagon, making CEO $31B richer overnight
item.description: Dell stock surged roughly 30% over the last 24 hours – boosting founder and CEO Michael Dell’s net worth by some $36 billion as well as the shares purchased by President Trump in February. Dell’s net worth is now valued at roughly $245.9 billion, putting… [Dell Technologies, ServiceNow]

item.title: Billionaire investor Dan Loeb dismisses AI bubble talk: 'We're barely scratching the surface'
item.description: Dan Loeb said he doesn't see a "valuation bubble" in AI, and pointed to Anthropic's rapid progress and Big Tech's earnings and cash generation. [Anthropic]

item.title: Token Shock Hits Silicon Valley’s Biggest Spenders
item.description: Enterprise AI used to come with a predictable price tag. AI rewrote the bill. Uber exhausted its full-year 2026 artificial intelligence budget by April. CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga said the company was “back to the drawing board,” according to The Information. … [Intel, Uber]

item.title: Samsung vs SK Hynix Stocks 2026: AI Memory Boom — Which Chip Giant Wins the Race?
item.description: Samsung and SK Hynix, South Korea's leading memory chipmakers, report record profits in 2026, driven by high demand for AI-related memory products, positioning them as key players in the global market. [Samsung]

item.title: Meta vs Microsoft Stocks 2026: Which Tech Giant Is the Better Buy?
item.description: In 2026, Meta and Microsoft are key players in AI, each with unique strategies. Meta focuses on advertising and AI innovation, while Microsoft offers diversified growth through cloud and enterprise solutions. [Microsoft, Meta]

item.title: Digital Transformation in Healthcare Market to Hit USD 340 Billion by 2035 Amid AI and Telehealth Expansion – SNS Insider
item.description: U.S. market projected to hit USD 99.5 Billion by 2035, while Europe is forecast to reach USD 87.42 Billion as AI-driven clinical workflows and interoperability initiatives accelerate adoption. U.S. market projected to hit USD 99.5 Billion by 2035, while Europ…
